title: Trusted Delivery, Supply Chain, Progressive Release, and Rollback · Evidence Recall
summary: A delayed review reconstructs trusted delivery, supply chain, progressive release, and rollback from stakeholder, decision, assumption, revision, artifact, observation, changed case, rejected failure, repair, owner, and residual-risk evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for trusted progressive delivery dossier after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bind reviewed source, protected workflow, isolated builder, inputs, dependencies, output digest, provenance, and verification.
Maintain current direct, transitive, generated, container, service, data, model, and license inventory with vulnerability ownership.
Constrain events, untrusted input, tokens, OIDC claims, secrets, runners, caches, environments, approvals, and audit evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-2 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-2
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Source Build Provenance · changed case · Review Source Build Provenance
steps.instruction:
review case — Automation rebuilds mutable inputs with broad secrets in each environment, then moves full traffic before provenance, guardrails, or rollback are verified. The review variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

Which action demonstrates Source Build Provenance without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Source Build Provenance · changed case · Review Source Build Provenance.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for bind reviewed source, protected workflow, isolated builder, inputs, dependencies, output digest, provenance, and verification. For Source Build Provenance · changed case · Review Source Build Provenance, keep Source Build Provenance connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: Automation rebuilds mutable inputs with broad secrets in each environment, then moves full traffic before provenance, guardrails, or rollback are verified. The review variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Source Build Provenance condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: ACM IEEE AAAI Computer Science Curricula 2023 — Controls competency-based progression, project work, professional practice, ethics, accessibility, security, testing, and the integration of knowledge with observable performance.

options.text: A checksum proves who built an artifact and from which source. That claim fails the source build provenance · changed case evidence boundary for Source Build Provenance.

For source build provenance · changed case, apply Source Build Provenance without its stated preconditions, omit the trusted progressive delivery dossier trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Source Build Provenance for trusted progressive delivery dossier.

Bind reviewed source, protected workflow, isolated builder, inputs, dependencies, output digest, provenance, and verification. Apply it to the stated input and retain a reproducible trace for trusted progressive delivery dossier.
